ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the algorithm (e.g., NASDAQ_CONN) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the algorithm (e.g., CONN) */,
  "stance" TEXT /* Stance of the algorithm (e.g., hold, none) */,
  "totalsum" REAL /* Total sum invested in the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the metric belongs to */,
  "accumgain" REAL /* Accumulative gain of the algorithm */,
  "tradinggain" REAL /* Trading gain of the algorithm */,
  "tradingnum" INTEGER /* Number of trades made by the algorithm */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the algorithm (e.g., high, low) */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the algorithm */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algo_id FOREIGN KEY ("algo_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "benchmark" REAL /* Market benchmark value */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock */,
  "lastDate" TEXT /* Last trade date */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the market (e.g., tech, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the holding belongs to */,
  "holding_num" INTEGER /* Number of holdings */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the algorithm */,
  "holding_value" REAL /* Value of the holding */,
  "holding_date" TEXT /* Date the holding was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_algo_id FOREIGN KEY ("algo_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the user interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the algorithm */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, rank) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_algo_id FOREIGN KEY ("algo_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., risk tolerance, investment horizon) */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algo_id FOREIGN KEY ("algo_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_backtest_results" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest result */,
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the backtest result belongs to */,
  "backtest_date" TEXT /* Date the backtest was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the backtest (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_backtest_results_algo_id FOREIGN KEY ("algo_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algo_id")
)
